title: Onici Wen
content: {{Top|ca|leg|notoc=1}} {{Character |type= |image= |name=Onici Wen |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species= |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]]{{InsiderCite|67|Who's Who in the Max Rebo Band}} |pronouns= |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} '''Onici Wen''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] who became mistress to [[Bib Fortuna/Legends|Bib Fortuna]], the [[Majordomo/Legends|majordomo]] of{{DB|character|bibfortuna|Fortuna, Bib}} the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine's]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]],{{Film|VI}} by [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]. That [[Standard year/Legends|year]],''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' establishes the [[Battle of the Great Pit of Carkoon]] and the preceding journey of the [[Khetanna/Legends|''Khetanna'']] to the [[Great Pit of Carkoon/Legends|pit]] occurred in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]. Fortuna sent his errand-runner, [[Doda Bodonawieedo/Legends|Doda Bodonawieedo]], to Tatooine's [[City/Legends|city]]''[[Star Wars Trilogy Sourcebook, Special Edition]]'' of [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] to deliver a love-letter to Wen. A few [[Standard hour/Legends|hours]] after Bodonawieedo was sent to Mos Eisley, Jabba's [[Luxury-class sail barge|luxury sail barge]], the [[Khetanna/Legends|''Khetanna'']], left the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt's]] Tatooine [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|palace]] and was destroyed in the [[Battle of the Great Pit of Carkoon]]. Due to that coincidental [[Time/Legends|timing]], Bodonawieedo was spared from [[Death/Legends|death]]. ==Behind the scenes== Onici Wen was mentioned in "[[Who's Who in the Max Rebo Band]]," an article [[Rich Handley]] wrote for the [[Star Wars Insider 67|sixty-seventh issue]] of the ''[[Star Wars Insider]]'' magazine, released on [[April 15]], [[2003]].{{SWArchive|url=community/news/2003/03/news20030317.html|text=Celebrate Jedi's 20th in ''Insider'' #67}} ==Sources== *{{InsiderCite|67|Who's Who in the Max Rebo Band}} {{1stm}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |nl=Onici Wen }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Wen, Onici}} [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified species]] [[Category:Individuals with unspecified pronouns]]
